title: actinodaphne cupularis
intro: Actinodaphne cupularis, also known as the Himalayan actinodaphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Actinodaphne cupularis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Actinodaphne cupularis is often used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, decoctions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
